/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmsgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so -o libmsgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so CMakeFiles/msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/msgs/msg/trash_item__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/msgs/msg/trash_count__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/msgs/msg/robot_status__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/msgs/msg/game_state__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/msgs/srv/collect_trash__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/msgs/srv/unload_trash__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_cpp/msgs/srv/reset_game__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
